comments:
Graph Viewport — Zoom, pan, and virtualization for large graph/tree displays.

## Design Philosophy

Large graphs (100k+ nodes) cannot render all elements. The viewport defines
what portion of the graph is visible, enabling:

- **Culling**: Only render nodes within viewport bounds
- **Level of Detail**: Simplify nodes at low zoom levels
- **Progressive Loading**: Load nodes as they enter viewport
- **Smooth Navigation**: Pan and zoom with animation

## Coordinate System

Graph space is infinite. Viewport defines a window into that space:

```
┌──────────────────────────────┐  Graph Space (infinite)
│                              │
│   ┌──────────────┐           │
│   │   Viewport   │           │
│   │   (visible)  │           │
│   └──────────────┘           │
│                              │
└──────────────────────────────┘
```

## Dependencies

- Prelude
- Data.Maybe

declarations.comments:
Zoom level for graph viewport.

- 1.0 = 100% (default, 1:1 mapping)
- 0.5 = 50% (zoomed out, see more)
- 2.0 = 200% (zoomed in, see less)

Bounded to [0.01, 100.0] to prevent degenerate states.
declarations.title: ViewportZoom

declarations.comments: Create a zoom level, clamped to valid range
declarations.title: viewportZoom

declarations.comments: Calculate zoom to fit content in viewport
declarations.title: zoomToFit

declarations.comments: Pan position in graph space coordinates
declarations.title: ViewportPosition

declarations.comments: Create bounds from center and size
declarations.title: boundsFromCenter

declarations.comments: Check if point is within bounds
declarations.title: containsPoint

declarations.comments: Calculate visible bounds at current state
declarations.title: viewportBoundsAt

declarations.comments:
Apply zoom delta (preserving center)

When zooming, the center point of the viewport should remain stable.
This requires recalculating the pan position based on the ratio
between old and new zoom levels.
declarations.title: applyZoom

declarations.comments: Determine LOD based on zoom level
declarations.title: lodForZoom

declarations.comments: Should a node be rendered at this LOD?
declarations.title: shouldRenderNode

declarations.comments: Should labels be rendered at this LOD?
declarations.title: shouldRenderLabel

declarations.comments: Should connections be rendered at this LOD?
declarations.title: shouldRenderConnection

declarations.comments: Cull a node against viewport bounds
declarations.title: cullNode

declarations.comments: Cull a connection against viewport bounds
declarations.title: cullConnection

declarations.comments: Virtualization window - what portion of data to load/render
declarations.title: VirtualWindow

declarations.comments: Create virtual window from viewport state
declarations.title: virtualWindow

declarations.comments: Check if point is in window
declarations.title: isInWindow

declarations.comments: Determine loading priority based on position
declarations.title: loadingPriority

declarations.comments: Zoom to fit content (placeholder, actual value computed)
declarations.title: zoomFit
